identity.one_liner: Workflow-centered, law-first AI governance for AI-supported business processes
identity.current_phase: Configurable workflow depth and product credibility
identity.primary_goal: Make AI governance operational inside real workflows
primary_users: teams designing or reviewing AI-enabled business workflows

current_state.summary: EthicFlow is already beyond concept stage. Landing page, onboarding/demo entry, theme switching, dark-mode polish, SEO metadata, visible logo support, and /demo/ deployment fixes have been completed and merged into develop. The focus now shifts toward deeper product capabilities rather than more front-door polish.
focus: roadmap definition for the next product-feature phase
risks: roadmap and project-state knowledge can drift if docs, memory, and project YAML are not updated together

recent_milestones: landing page added as the new product entry point
guided vs self-directed demo entry path introduced
theme switching and broad dark-mode polish completed
SEO metadata and visible logo support added
/demo/ asset path issues fixed for static deployment
roadmap updated for the next real product-feature phase

roadmap_groups.name: Reusable workflow templates
items: EthicFlow for EthicFlow founder / internal workflow template

roadmap_groups.name: Process node configuration
items: custom node type definitions from settings
configurable metadata fields per node type
node type can start as Human/System/AI and later be changed in the edit form
editable EU AI Act article list before and after automatic generation
auto-generation adds allowed articles only and does not overwrite user documentation choices

roadmap_groups.name: Stronger reporting and export structure
items: stronger report structure for governance and requirements workflows
configurable export schema direction including Polarion-oriented requirements structures

roadmap_groups.name: Better evidence and documentation state tracking

identity.one_liner: AI-powered skill mapping and growth planning based on work, hobbies, side projects, and life experience
identity.current_phase: MVP for individual users with onboarding-first skill and recommendation flow
identity.primary_goal: Help people discover transferable skills and turn them into personalized learning, pivot, and opportunity paths
primary_users: individuals exploring growth, career pivots, or side-hustle opportunities
people adapting to a changing AI-shaped work landscape

current_state.summary: Pathlizr has moved from a simple learning-path idea toward an AI-powered skill mapping product. The first onboarding-first MVP flow is implemented end-to-end, with persisted experience entries, skill review, target selection, recommendation output, and onboarding completion state.
focus: strengthen skill inference beyond lightweight heuristics
evolve onboarding outputs into a longer-term user skill model
risks: product direction can appear broader than the current implementation if messaging and roadmap are not kept aligned

recent_milestones: onboarding completion saved to the user profile
dashboard reflects onboarding state and saved experiences
product direction shifted from generic path tracking toward AI-powered skill mapping

roadmap_groups.name: Improve the intelligence layer
items: better skill inference beyond keyword heuristics
possible CV upload as an accelerator
